description_long: This is a retro-futuristic unicycle with a robust metal frame and a large, thick tire encircling a visible engine and mechanical components. The body is painted in a teal blue color with a brown leather saddle seat and a matching leather side pouch, giving it a vintage aesthetic. The front features a prominent round headlamp and a curved windscreen, while the handlebars are wide and slightly angled for ergonomic grip. A cylindrical orange container is mounted atop the main body, possibly for storage or as a fuel canister. The engine and mechanical parts are exposed, with visible springs and pipes, adding to its industrial look. Decorative decals and colored accents are present on the side panels, enhancing its unique character.
description: A vintage-style, teal blue unicycle with a large wheel, exposed engine, brown leather saddle, and wide handlebars, featuring industrial and decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved windscreen, round headlamp, and wide handlebars, with the large wheel and teal body dominating the perspective.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the exposed engine, teal side panel with decals, brown leather saddle, and attached side pouch.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown leather saddle, rear fender, and license plate area, with handlebars and orange canister visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the engine, teal side panel, springs, pipes, and the overall mechanical complexity, mirroring the left side but without the pouch.
